creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your updated submission.  This looks great.  On commit I will:

 - remove the README.md file
 - move the man page to share/man, which is part of an ongoing refactor

As for the "maintainer-approval" bit: this is your port, you are the maintainer.  So set "maintainer-approval" to "+" to indicate that you, the maintainer, approve of the patch for which you set the flag.
